```{r}
#| label: tbl-agent-per-infection-rate
#| tbl-cap: !expr 'sR$`tbl-agent-per-infection-rate`$`tbl-cap`'
#| tbl-cap-location: top

tbl_data <- reference_data |>
  neoipcr::get_infectious_agent_detection_rate_per_agent_table()

tbl <- tbl_data |>
  dplyr::select(-tidyselect::any_of(".ontology_path")) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    group = dplyr::if_else(
      stringr::str_detect(group, "spp."),
      paste0("*", stringr::str_extract(group, "^(.+) spp\\.(.*)$", 1), "* spp.", stringr::str_extract(group, "^(.+) spp\\.(.*)$", 2)),
      group
      )) |>
  dplyr::rename(
    !!sR$table_headers$n := "n",
    !!sR$table_headers$pooled := "pooled",
    !!sR$table_headers$q1 := "q1",
    !!sR$table_headers$q2 := "q2",
    !!sR$table_headers$q3 := "q3")

if (!include_ci) {
  tbl <- tbl |>
    dplyr::select(!tidyselect::any_of(c(
      "ci_lower", "ci_upper",
      "q1_ci_lower", "q1_ci_upper",
      "q2_ci_lower", "q2_ci_upper",
      "q3_ci_lower", "q3_ci_upper")))
}

gt_tbl <- tbl |>
  gt(rowname_col = "group") |>
  sub_missing() |>
  gt::fmt_markdown(columns = c("group")) |>
  gt::tab_options(
    latex.header_repeat = TRUE,
    latex.use_longtable = TRUE,
    table.width = pct(100),
    table.font.size = 11,
    footnotes.marks = "extended"
  ) |>
  fmt_number(
    columns = !sR$table_headers$n,
    decimals = 1,
    sep_mark = sR$digit_group_separator,
    min_sep_threshold = 2,
    locale = locale_gt) |>
  fmt_integer(
    columns = sR$table_headers$n,
    sep_mark = sR$digit_group_separator,
    min_sep_threshold = 2)

if (include_ci) {
  # Merge pooled rate CI as parenthetical: "6.7 (5.9–7.6)"
  gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |>
    cols_merge(
      columns = c(sR$table_headers$pooled, "ci_lower", "ci_upper"),
      pattern = "{1} ({2}\u2013{3})",
      rows = !is.na(tbl_data$pooled))

  # Merge bootstrap CIs into quartile columns: "5.2 (4.1–6.8)"
  # Only on rows where bootstrap CIs are non-NA (Bug 8: avoid "— (—–—)")
  if (all(c("q1_ci_lower", "q1_ci_upper") %in% names(tbl))) {
    has_boot <- !is.na(tbl$q1_ci_lower)
    gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |>
      cols_merge(
        columns = c(sR$table_headers$q1, "q1_ci_lower", "q1_ci_upper"),
        pattern = "{1} ({2}\u2013{3})",
        rows = has_boot) |>
      cols_merge(
        columns = c(sR$table_headers$q2, "q2_ci_lower", "q2_ci_upper"),
        pattern = "{1} ({2}\u2013{3})",
        rows = has_boot) |>
      cols_merge(
        columns = c(sR$table_headers$q3, "q3_ci_lower", "q3_ci_upper"),
        pattern = "{1} ({2}\u2013{3})",
        rows = has_boot)
  }
}

gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |>
  cols_width(
    stub() ~ pct(30),
    sR$table_headers$n ~ pct(5),
    sR$table_headers$pooled ~ pct(20),
    sR$table_headers$q1 ~ pct(15),
    sR$table_headers$q2 ~ pct(15),
    sR$table_headers$q3 ~ pct(15))

gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |>
  gt::tab_stub_indent(
    rows = gt::everything(),
    indent = gt::from_column(column = "level")
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(
      weight = "bold"
    ),
    locations = cells_stub(
      rows = taxon %in% c(
        "none",
        "domain",
        "kingdom",
        "order",
        "genus",
        "coag_type")
    )
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(
      style = "italic"
      ),
    locations = cells_stub(
      rows = taxon %in% c(
        "domain",
        "kingdom",
        "order",
        "species")
      )
  ) |>
  cols_hide(columns = any_of(c("level","taxon"))) |>
  tab_spanner(
    label = sR$`tbl-agent-per-infection-rate`$`rate_name`,
    columns = tidyselect::any_of(
     c(
     sR$table_headers$pooled,
     sR$table_headers$q1,
     sR$table_headers$q2,
     sR$table_headers$q3)),
    id = "infectious_agent_detection_rate"
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = list(
      cells_column_spanners(),
      cells_column_labels(),
      cells_row_groups()
    )
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = md(
      paste0(
        "$$\\text{",
        sR$`tbl-agent-per-infection-rate`$rate_name,
        "} = \\frac{\\text{",
        sR$`tbl-agent-per-infection-rate`$rate_numerator,
        "}}{\\text{",
        sR$`tbl-agent-per-infection-rate`$rate_denominator,
        "}} \\times ",
        format_integer(100),
        "$$"
      )),
    locations = cells_column_spanners(spanners = "infectious_agent_detection_rate")
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = sprintf(
      sR$`tbl-agent-per-infection-rate`$n_footnote,
      sR$table_headers$n),
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$n)) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = sprintf(
      sR$`tbl-agent-per-infection-rate`$pooled_footnote,
      sR$table_headers$pooled),
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$pooled))

# Sparse-data footnote for N < 10
sparse_rows <- which(tbl_data$n < 10 & !is.na(tbl_data$n) & tbl_data$n > 0)
if (length(sparse_rows) > 0) {
  fn_text <- if (include_ci) sR$sparse_data_footnote else sR$sparse_data_footnote_no_ci
  gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |>
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = fn_text,
      locations = cells_body(
        columns = sR$table_headers$pooled,
        rows = sparse_rows))
}

gt_tbl
```
